array.string: export PATH=/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin; WORK_ROOT=/Users/yashs/Documents/WorkDirectory; DASHBOARD_ROOT=$WORK_ROOT/hiastro-business-dashboard; PYTHON=$WORK_ROOT/.venv/bin/python; GIT=/usr/bin/git; cd "$WORK_ROOT" || exit 1; for attempt in 1 2 3; do "$PYTHON" "$DASHBOARD_ROOT/scripts/build_dashboard_data.py" && break; if [ "$attempt" = "3" ]; then exit 1; fi; echo "Dashboard refresh failed on attempt $attempt; retrying in 90 seconds..."; sleep 90; done; cd "$DASHBOARD_ROOT" || exit 1; "$GIT" fetch origin main; if ! "$GIT" diff --quiet -- data/dashboard_data.json; then "$GIT" add data/dashboard_data.json; "$GIT" commit -m "Refresh dashboard data"; "$GIT" push origin main; else echo "No dashboard data changes to commit."; fi
